name: Ladybird Larva

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It lunges with a short direct bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or sidestep its line.
attacks.notes: Its base hit and the start of the sizzling buildup.

attacks.name: Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It chains multiple quick bites together.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish until the full sequence ends.
attacks.notes: If several use this together, the sizzling meter climbs extremely fast.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It pulls its head back before a longer lunge.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge sideways instead of backing straight away.
attacks.notes: It hits harder and catches players healing at mid-range.

attacks.name: Dodging Hop
attacks.tell: It makes two large backward hops to escape punishment.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not chase blindly; wait to see whether it re-engages from a new angle.
attacks.notes: It does not deal direct damage, but it breaks your tempo and extends the fight.

description: A hardened larva built to survive the upper yard and especially the BBQ Spill. In groups it becomes one of the nastiest threats in that part of the yard.
behavior: It has a normal roaming variant and a burrowed variant that behaves more like a smaller antlion. Both keep the usual larva bites and add a backward dodge hop to reposition.
interactionWithPlayer: It is aggressive on sight or when bursting out of the ground. Every hit raises your sizzling meter, so several hits in a row can set you ablaze even if the raw damage seemed manageable.
interactionWithCreatures: Outside of the player, it barely interacts with other creatures. The burrowed variant usually waits hidden until something enters its forward trigger zone.
strategy: Fresh and stabbing are excellent here. Do not use spicy: the resistance is brutal. A shield helps a lot because the bites are blockable, and the key is avoiding being boxed in by several while your sizzling bar climbs.
respawnInfo: 1.75 days by default. Around the woodpile it takes 1 day, in the burrow 1.5 days, and in the BBQ Spill 2 days.
specialTraits: Its attacks build up sizzling. One specific larva in the burrow always drops an Insulating Larva Spike and never respawns.
